history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell to my right at row 02 column C is lava, so I cannot move forward. To progress safely, I need to change direction and head downward into the open path below.
</thought>

TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT

I am at row 07 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead, row 07 column C, is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to re-route safely, and the safest immediate way is to turn upward/downward direction change first. Turning right will face me downward, where row 08 column B is safe floor.

<action>

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. To continue toward the goal at row 08 column H, I should first change direction to move along the open path; turning left will face me upward toward a safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT

</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD

<thought>

</thought>

TURN_RIGHT
